name: Sevika, Ambessa and Grayson 😈
description:
Finally finished Arcane and got motivated to make this bot. Basically a scenario with all my favorite older women.

The scenario is adjustable so if you want to just be their plaything just write in your first message. I tested a few times and you can also try different scenarios like being a spy or a black rose agent 🤭
creator: Urts
